# Code of Conduct

This repository expects calm, respectful, constructive participation.

## Expected Behavior

- Stay focused on the project purpose and the specific change under discussion.
- Give feedback that is direct, kind, and technically useful.
- Respect different viewpoints and levels of context.
- Credit sources and avoid presenting borrowed work as original.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, personal attacks, or repeated unwanted attention.
- Discriminatory, sexualized, threatening, or demeaning language.
- Sharing private information without consent.
- Promotional or off-topic material that disrupts the work.

## Reporting

Report concerns privately through the maintainer profile at https://github.com/sdhutchins.

This file is adapted from the code-of-conduct template in `sdhutchins/github-templates` and narrowed for this repository.
